full_text:
Hou Cao
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Hou Cao. Stole fifteen horses to sell to Liu Bei but was killed by Hou Cheng. Hou Cao is a fictional character. Hou Cao was affiliated with Lu Bu.
